summary: GH05T3 iteration-4 proactive bug sweep complete. 34/34 new pytest green covering every endpoint in the review request. No new bugs found. Chat end-to-end works (hello -> multi-word reply), session persistence verified (4+ messages), KAIROS cycles return verdict+final_score+proposal, Cassandra returns non-empty autopsy, WebSocket /api/ws emits state_delta on kairos cycle. Coder validation confirmed: missing task -> 422, bad repo -> ok:false 'not whitelisted', max_iterations=99 clamped to 6 silently. Ollama /configure validates URL shape (garbage 'http//bad' -> error='invalid url shape', empty string -> accepted+reachable=false, valid URL persists). Memory search with empty q does not crash. Chat memory extraction of 'I use VS Code for Python' surfaces in /api/memory/recent within ~10s. /api/state contains all 14 required top-level keys (identity, hardware_tatortot, sub_agents, memory_palace, hcm, kairos, pcl, ghost_protocol, scoreboard, twin_engine, gateway, schedule, scheduler, autotelic_goals). No ObjectId leaks observed in any response. /api/coder/runs returns descending by timestamp with intact task+result shape.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1286 lines with 14+ subsystems (chat, kairos, memory, cassandra, stego, ghostscript, scheduler, telegram, WS, coder, ollama, setup, embeddings, killswitches, phase6, ghosteye, companion). Split-into-routers debt carried from iterations 2-3 still stands and keeps growing.

coder_agent.run_task() wall-clock timeout still absent on the outer loop; internal _run has per-command 120-180s timeouts but a runaway PyTest could still iterate max_iterations times at 180s each = up to 18 minutes of worker occupancy. Consider asyncio.wait_for wrapping the whole run_task with a 10-minute hard cap.
/api/coder/task returns HTTP 200 for 'repo not whitelisted' with ok:false. Consider returning 403 for clarity — ok:false-in-200 is ambiguous for client error handling.

/api/memory/search with q='' currently returns 200 with empty/partial results because motor's aggregation does not crash on blank text; good behaviour but undocumented. Add an explicit `if not q.strip(): return {'query': q, 'hits': []}` short-circuit to save an embedding call per empty request.

Chat budget-exhausted fallback path (server.py:232-243) is reached only when nightly router ALSO raises BudgetExhaustedError. In practice, with Google/Groq keys present in llm_config, this fallback is dead code for iteration-4. Worth a unit test simulating BudgetExhaustedError from nightly_chat to prove the user-facing assistant reply actually fires.

Memory extraction (background asyncio.create_task in _background_memory_extract) has no retry, no DLQ, and no timeout; if the nightly LLM wedges, the task vanishes silently — only visible via `logger.exception`. Consider a bounded semaphore + timeout.
_id projection: verified clean on all endpoints we touched (state, coder/runs, memory/recent, ghosteye/recent, chat/history). Stego/ghostscript have no Mongo persistence so trivially clean.
test_credentials: none required — EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, GITHUB_PAT, CODER_REPO_WHITELIST preset in /app/backend/.env; Google/Groq keys live in mongo db.llm_config
seed_data_creation: Test adds TEST_<uuid>-tagged memory 'proactive sweep marker' (type=fact, importance=0.5) and a session chat memory about 'VS Code for Python'. Both embed via local:minilm@384d. No cleanup needed — tagged for idempotence.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration-4 suite is /app/backend/tests/test_gh05t3_phase4.py (34 tests, all pass, ~108s wall). It covers every endpoint in the current server.py /api router. For WS testing: wss:// URL is derived from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — kairos/cycle fires a state_delta within ~5s. /api/ollama/configure now persists after each run — the test resets to 'http://nonexistent.local:11434' at the end. /api/coder/task ONLY exercised with the bogus 'attacker/evil' repo (per review request — never trigger a real whitelisted repo). autotelic_goals + schedule fields confirmed present in /api/state. Ollama configure empty-string path accepts empty url (reachable=false, url='') — by design per ollama_gateway.py:70-73.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 34 assertions green. The only nits surface in the critical_code_review_comments (file-size, coder wall-clock, HTTP code pedantry, empty-query micro-optimisation, budget-exhausted dead-code coverage) — none block shipping. The user's ask was a proactive sweep; the sweep cast a wide net across 34 distinct endpoints and the backend held up cleanly.
